chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-232 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). 1. For hearing of CMA No.1170/2022 (stay). 2. For hearing of Main Case 22.03.2022 Sardar Muhammad Ishaque, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-. After hearing both the learned counsel at considerable length and with the consent of both the parties, the instant petition stands disposed of in the following terms:- (a) That since a show cause notice has been issued in the instant matter by the Customs Authorities, the petitioner would file proper reply in response thereto and the Department after granting ample opportunity of hearing to the petitioner would then pass Order-in-Original strictly in accordance with law. (b) Let said exercise be completed within a period of one month’s time from the date of receipt of this order. With these directions instant petition alongwith listed application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
